subcodes.first_line: O Son of Barát! Hearken unto that which thy Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, calleth thee, and remindeth thee of the Day wherein the Lord shall speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن برات ان استمع ما ینادیک به ربک العزیز الوهاب و یذکرک بیوم ینطق فیه رب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
